search_documents.author: PRD
search_documents.snippet: REQ-245: Maximum gripper actuation torque shall not exceed 15 Nm to protect the harmonic drive.

search_documents.author: BOM
search_documents.snippet: Harmonic drive HD-17 rated continuous torque 16 Nm, peak 18 Nm.

search_messages.author: maya
search_messages.snippet: We bumped the gripper torque limit to 22 Nm in firmware to fix the slip on the heavy fixtures.

search_messages.author: ravi
search_messages.snippet: 22 Nm holds the part now, ship it for the DVT build.

query_signals.summary: Raise gripper firmware torque ceiling to 22 Nm to stop fixture slip.

search_documents.author: BOM
search_documents.snippet: Chassis baseplate supplier of record: AlumWest, part CB-204, flatness 0.05mm.

search_messages.author: dana
search_messages.snippet: AlumWest FAI failed flatness twice, 0.12mm vs 0.05mm spec. Moving CB-204 to MetricForm for PVT.

search_messages.author: dana
search_messages.snippet: MetricForm adds 3 weeks lead time and ~8% unit cost, but they hit flatness.

query_signals.summary: Baseplate flatness failures at AlumWest threaten PVT schedule.

search_documents.author: PRD
search_documents.snippet: REQ-118: Power-on self-test completes within 3 seconds.

search_messages.author: sam
search_messages.snippet: Standup: finished the cable routing rework, no blockers, picking up test fixtures next.

search_messages.author: lee
search_messages.snippet: Lunch order going out at noon, reply with picks.

search_messages.author: kim
search_messages.snippet: Confirmed 48V pack matches spec, closing the voltage question, all good.

query_signals.summary: Battery pack stays at 48V nominal per REQ-090, no change.
